items.title: Raphinha apologizes after gesture at Atleti fans
items.summary: Raphinha has apologised for winding up Atlético Madrid supporters after Barcelona's Champions League exit at the Metropolitano on Tuesday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Ngidi credits Bravo for the development of slower ball
items.summary: The 30-year-old’s varied repertoire has continued to be effective for Delhi Capitals in IPL 2026

items.title: England seamer Tongue signs three-year Notts deal
items.summary: England fast bowler Josh Tongue signs new three-year contract with the county champions.
